datasheet.text: In your Shooting phase , after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
datasheet.name: Suppression Volley

datasheet.text: In your Movement phase , if this unit Remains Stationary , until the start of your next Movement phase, its Fire Warrior Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret missile system weapon.
datasheet.name: DS8 Support Turret

datasheet.text: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.
datasheet.name: Designer’s Note

unit_composition.text: pulse pistol; pulse rifle; close combat weapon.
unit_composition.label: Every model is equipped with

entries.label: The Fire Warrior Shas’ui can be equipped with up to two of the following, and can take duplicates:
items: 1 guardian drone (it cannot take duplicates of this piece of wargear)

entries.label: Any number of Fire Warrior models can each have their pulse rifle replaced with 1 pulse carbine.
